examples.text: Picture warm, gooey cookies, crunchy candies, velvety cakes, waffle cones piled high with ice cream.
examples.explanation: 想象一下温热的、黏糊糊的饼干，脆脆的糖果，丝滑的蛋糕，还有高高堆满冰淇淋的华夫筒。

source.text: 糖类怎样影响大脑 -Nicole Avena

reviewSessions.example_text: Picture warm, gooey cookies, crunchy candies, velvety cakes, waffle cones piled high with ice cream.
reviewSessions.feedback: 这次没填对，正确答案是 gooey。
missing_points: 需要回忆出目标词 gooey
